characters.appearance: Female with short, sleek black hair parted to the side, fair complexion, and blue eyes. She has defined, symmetrical facial features typical of AI generation.
characters.wardrobe: A futuristic white and grey robotic torso suit with mechanical joints, paneling, and glowing blue accents.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, with short dark hair. He is only seen from the side/back.
characters.wardrobe: A plain grey hoodie and dark blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Static and observant, standing still while looking at the screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: दिन भर रील्स स्क्रोल करने से अच्छा है, थोड़ा टाइम अपने लिए निकालो। [Instead of scrolling reels all day, take some time out for yourself.]
Character A says: सोचो, अगर रोज़ थोड़ी प्रैक्टिस करते, तो आज कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोल रहे होते। [Imagine, if you practiced a little every day, you'd be speaking English with confidence today.]
Character A says: दुनिया बहुत तेज़ी से आगे बढ़ रही है, और इंग्लिश आना अब ज़रूरी हो गया है। [The world is moving forward very fast, and knowing English has become essential now.]
Character A says: इंटरव्यू हो या ऑफिस की मीटिंग, हर जगह इंग्लिश की ज़रूरत पड़ती है। [Whether it's an interview or an office meeting, English is needed everywhere.]
Character A says: तो तुम पीछे क्यों रहो? [So why should you stay behind?]
Character A says: Supernova ऐप पर मेरे जैसे AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ बात करो। [Talk daily with an AI tutor like me on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: क्योंकि इंग्लिश सिर्फ ग्रामर रटने से नहीं, बोलने से आती है। [Because English comes from speaking, not just memorizing grammar.]
Character A says: मैं तुम्हारी गलतियां बिना किसी जजमेंट के ठीक करूंगी। [I will correct your mistakes without any judgment.]
Character A says: हज़ारों लोगों ने Supernova के साथ अपनी झिझक दूर की है। [Thousands of people have overcome their hesitation with Supernova.]
Character A says: तो अब तुम्हारी बारी है। [So now it's your turn.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करो और बेझिझक इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू करो। [Download Supernova today and start speaking English without hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by gently contrasting time spent scrolling with time spent improving oneself.
- Introduces the AI tutor as a non-judgmental practice partner for real-world situations like interviews.
- Ends with a warm, encouraging call to action to build speaking confidence.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: तो अभी इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Direct call to action to install the app.
- Reinforces the Supernova brand name visually and audibly.

- Standard legal disclaimer screen.
- Sets realistic expectations regarding effort and results.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai Supernova kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
